name: Page Cache
description: Set browser cache headers for public pages and static uploads to improve performance.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Enable cache headers
settings.description: Send Cache-Control headers on public GET responses.

settings.label: Cache duration (seconds)
settings.description: How long browsers may cache HTML pages.

settings.label: Cache homepage
settings.description: Apply cache headers to the homepage.

settings.label: Cache post pages
settings.description: Apply cache headers to single post URLs.

settings.label: Cache uploads
settings.description: Apply longer cache headers to /uploads/ assets.

settings.label: Excluded paths
settings.description: Comma-separated path prefixes that should not be cached.
